headline: Jeff Bezos Makes Waves With Reported $68M Florida Home: A Glimpse Into His Expanding Property Portfolio
summary:
Amazon's co-founder Jeff Bezos has garnered attention with his reported $68 million purchase of a luxurious Florida mansion.

Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) co-founder, Jeff Bezos, has reportedly secured a lavish $68 million Florida residence.

headline: NFT Craze A Reminder Of Tulip Mania? Keep Calm And Buy Non-Fungible Tulips
summary:
The non-fungible tokens are mirroring a period in Holland’s golden age known as Tulip Mania — quite literally.
